Browser game delivery

Pocket Office Quest N64 Brick Edition

An original office exploration game with toy-brick-inspired personage avatars, clearer facial rendering, a redesigned office room, and a browser build that opens from the included files on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

No build step to play
Toy-brick portraits and sprite sheets
Office redesigned with furniture

Status

Preparing browser build...

Avatar

Loading brick avatar data...

Objective

Loading the office room and interactive zones...

Compatibility

Static browser application. No build step is required to play.

Tip: add ?demo=1 to the file or URL to launch directly into an automated office tour.

Controls

  • Enter starts from the title screen and confirms selections.
  • Arrow keys or WASD move the avatar inside the office.
  • Shift sprints through the room.
  • Space, Enter, or Z interacts with furniture and teammates.
  • Escape returns to character select.

Office furniture included

Reception desk, double workstations, rolling chairs, library shelf, printer and copier, whiteboard, wall display, conference table, server rack, filing cabinets, archive shelving, coffee counter, water cooler, lounge sofa, side table, plants, windows, welcome mat, and front door.

Deliveries

README Requirements Test plan Test results Office layout rendering Personage sprite rendering Gameplay rendering
